description: An invoice is entered into the system, which flags it as a potential duplicate of an invoice already processed.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge the duplicate invoice alert from the system.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent notes the system has flagged an invoice based on having the same vendor and invoice number.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve and compare the details of the newly submitted invoice and the one already in the system.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms that both the invoice number and amount are identical.

nodes.task_description: Reject the new invoice as a duplicate and notify the person who submitted it.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent cancels the processing of the duplicate invoice and sends a notification.
